title: EXAMPLE — delete or edit me: seat-map legend doesn't mark booked seats with a stable selector
steps_to_reproduce: Search DEL -> BOM, select any flight
Inspect an unavailable (grey) seat in the seat map
Note it has no disabled/aria-disabled attribute or data-testid distinguishing it from an available seat
expected: Unavailable seats are identifiable via a stable attribute (disabled, aria-disabled, or data-testid) so automated tests don't rely on color/position.
actual: Unavailable seats appear to be styled only via CSS class, with no accessible/stable marker.
